content: You are a customer support agent. Help users with their account issues.
Hi, I'm having trouble logging into my account.
I'm sorry to hear that. Let me help you with your login issue. Can you tell me what error message you're seeing when you try to log in?
It says my password is incorrect, but I'm sure I'm entering the right one.

That can be frustrating. I'd recommend trying the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page. It will send a reset link to your registered email address. Would you like me to walk you through the process?
